title: Dispatch Operations Dashboard
meeting_summary: A regional logistics company needs a dispatch dashboard to assign drivers, track deliveries in real time, and generate daily performance reports. The system must integrate with their existing fleet API and support dispatcher and manager roles.

breakdown.task: Backend API for orders, routes, and driver status
Fleet API integration and data mapping
Role-based access control and audit logs

estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Dispatch Operations Dashboard

### Task Breakdown

| Task | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------:|-----------:|
| Discovery and requirements workshops | 18 | 1,125 |
| UI/UX design (dashboard, filters, alerts) | 32 | 2,000 |
| Backend API for orders, routes, and driver status | 60 | 3,750 |
| Real-time updates (websocket layer) | 28 | 1,750 |
| Fleet API integration and data mapping | 30 | 1,875 |
| Role-based access control and audit logs | 16 | 1,000 |
| Reporting module (daily KPIs, CSV export) | 20 | 1,250 |
| QA and UAT support | 24 | 1,500 |
| Deployment and monitoring setup | 12 | 750 |

### Totals

- Total hours: 240
- Total cost: 15,000 EUR

### Recommended Team

- 2 Full-Stack Developers
- 1 UX Designer (part-time)
- 1 QA Engineer (part-time)

### Estimated Duration

10 weeks

title: Fitness Studio Booking App
meeting_summary: A boutique fitness studio wants a mobile app where members can book classes, purchase packages, and receive push notifications for schedule changes. Staff need an admin panel to manage instructors and capacity.

breakdown.task: Mobile app UI/UX and design system
Admin panel for schedules and instructors
QA, app store preparation, and release

estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Fitness Studio Booking App

### Task Breakdown

| Task | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------:|-----------:|
| Product discovery and user flows | 20 | 1,250 |
| Mobile app UI/UX and design system | 40 | 2,500 |
| iOS and Android app development | 110 | 6,875 |
| Payments and package management | 24 | 1,500 |
| Admin panel for schedules and instructors | 36 | 2,250 |
| Push notification service | 18 | 1,125 |
| Analytics and retention dashboards | 16 | 1,000 |
| QA, app store preparation, and release | 26 | 1,625 |

### Totals

- Total hours: 290
- Total cost: 18,125 EUR

### Recommended Team

- 2 Mobile Developers
- 1 Backend Developer (part-time)
- 1 UX Designer (part-time)

### Estimated Duration

12 weeks

title: Client Onboarding Compliance Tool
meeting_summary: A financial advisory firm needs an internal web tool to capture client onboarding data, track document status, and generate compliance-ready summaries. The tool must integrate with their CRM and enforce access controls by role.
estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: Client Onboarding Compliance Tool

### Task Breakdown

| Task | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------:|-----------:|
| Requirements and compliance review | 22 | 1,375 |
| UI/UX design for onboarding flows | 28 | 1,750 |
| Core onboarding workflows and validation | 70 | 4,375 |
| Document tracking and status automation | 36 | 2,250 |
| CRM integration and data sync | 30 | 1,875 |
| Role-based permissions and audit logs | 20 | 1,250 |
| Reporting and compliance summaries | 24 | 1,500 |
| QA, security review, and hardening | 28 | 1,750 |
| Deployment and training materials | 12 | 750 |

### Totals

- Total hours: 270
- Total cost: 16,875 EUR

### Recommended Team

- 2 Full-Stack Developers
- 1 QA Engineer (part-time)

### Estimated Duration

11 weeks
